narrative:
Lemon Twp 1 (precinct in Butler County) has 390 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a modest Republican lean of 4.4 percentage points.
